path.style: display: inline; fill: none; stroke: rgb(209, 0, 0); stroke-width: 6.6; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-opacity: 1;
